import { useState } from 'react'; import { Clock, MapPin, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; const INTERNS=[ {role:'Full Stack Development Intern',dur:'3 Months',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',resp:['Build and test web features using React and Node.js','Write clean, documented code under senior guidance','Participate in standups, sprints, and code reviews','Contribute to UI components, API integrations, and database queries'],req:['Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript/React','Familiarity with Node.js or any backend framework is a plus','Strong willingness to learn and contribute']}, {role:'Game Development Intern (Unity/Unreal)',dur:'3 Months',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',resp:['Work on active game projects in the studio','Implement gameplay features, mechanics, and UI elements','Contribute to QA testing and performance optimisation','Assist with asset integration and scene management'],req:['Basic knowledge of Unity (C#) or Unreal Engine (Blueprints/C++)','Interest in game design or interactive media','Portfolio or game jam experience is a strong plus']}, {role:'UI/UX Design Intern',dur:'3 Months',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',resp:['Create wireframes, prototypes, and mockups in Figma','Contribute to design system components','Collaborate with developers on design implementation','Conduct basic user research and compile insights'],req:['Proficiency in Figma or equivalent tools','Eye for visual design, typography, and layout','Portfolio with 1–2 UI design projects']}, {role:'Data Analyst Intern',dur:'3 Months',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',resp:['Collect, clean and organise datasets','Build dashboards using Power BI or Google Data Studio','Identify trends and patterns from business data','Document data sources and maintain reporting templates'],req:['Basic knowledge of Python or SQL','Familiarity with Excel or any BI tool','Analytical mindset with attention to detail']}, {role:'Cyber Security Intern',dur:'3 Months',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',resp:['Assist in vulnerability assessments and security audits','Monitor systems for threats and document findings','Support implementation of security policies','Research emerging threats and contribute to reports'],req:['Basic understanding of networking and attack vectors','Familiarity with tools like Wireshark or Nmap is a plus','Strong interest in ethical hacking']}, {role:'App Developer Intern',dur:'3 Months',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',resp:['Build and test mobile app features for iOS or Android','Write clean, maintainable code under senior guidance','Participate in design reviews and UI implementation','Debug issues and optimise app performance'],req:['Basic knowledge of Flutter, React Native, or native iOS/Android','Familiarity with REST APIs and JSON','Eagerness to learn and ship real mobile features']}, {role:'IoT Engineer Intern',dur:'3 Months',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',resp:['Prototype and test IoT hardware/software integrations','Write embedded code to communicate with sensors','Contribute to cloud data pipelines from IoT devices','Document hardware setups and firmware configurations'],req:['Basic knowledge of Arduino, Raspberry Pi, or similar platforms','Familiarity with C/C++, Python, or MicroPython','Interest in embedded systems and hardware-software integration']}, {role:'DevOps Engineer Intern',dur:'3 Months',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',resp:['Set up and maintain CI/CD pipelines','Support cloud infrastructure on AWS or Azure','Monitor system performance and incident response','Automate deployment and configuration tasks'],req:['Basic knowledge of Linux, shell scripting, and Git','Familiarity with Docker or any CI/CD tool','Interest in cloud platforms and system reliability']}, ]; const FULL=[ {role:'Senior Full Stack Developer',exp:'3+ years',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',req:'React, Node.js, REST APIs, PostgreSQL or MongoDB, Docker, AWS/Azure',nth:'GraphQL, microservices, CI/CD pipeline ownership'}, {role:'Game Developer (Unity)',exp:'2+ years',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',req:'C#, Unity Engine, multiplayer/Photon experience, mobile optimisation',nth:'Unreal Engine, shader programming, game analytics'}, {role:'UI/UX Designer',exp:'2+ years',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',req:'Figma expert, design systems, responsive & accessible design — portfolio required',nth:'Motion design, Framer, basic HTML/CSS understanding'}, {role:'Data Analyst',exp:'2+ years',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',req:'Python or SQL, Power BI or Tableau, strong analytical skills',nth:'BigQuery, dbt, or data pipeline tooling'}, {role:'Cyber Security Engineer',exp:'2+ years',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',req:'VAPT experience, OWASP Top 10, networking and firewall management',nth:'CEH/OSCP certification, SIEM tools, cloud security'}, {role:'App Developer',exp:'2+ years',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',req:'Flutter or React Native, REST API integration, mobile performance optimisation',nth:'Native iOS (Swift) or Android (Kotlin), Firebase, app store deployment'}, {role:'IoT Engineer',exp:'2+ years',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',req:'C/C++ or Python for embedded systems, MQTT/HTTP protocols, AWS IoT or Azure IoT Hub',nth:'PCB design basics, RTOS experience, industrial IoT ecosystems'}, {role:'DevOps Engineer',exp:'2+ years',mode:'Remote/Hybrid',req:'Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform or Ansible, strong Linux and scripting skills',nth:'GitOps workflows, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring, multi-cloud experience'}, ]; function Card({job,type}){ const [open,setOpen]=useState(false); return(
{open&&(
{type==='intern'?(

Responsibilities

{job.resp.map((r,i)=>
›{r}
)}

Requirements

{job.req.map((r,i)=>
›{r}
)} Apply Now
):(

Requirements: {job.req}

{job.nth&&

Nice to have: {job.nth}

} Apply Now
)}
)}
); } export default function Careers(){return(
{/* HERO */}
Careers

Build Meaningful Things. Build Your Career.

We're always looking for passionate developers, designers, and problem-solvers who want to do their best work in an innovation-first environment.

{/* WHY JOIN */}
Why Join Synnoviq

Where your best work gets done

{['Real projects from day one — no busywork','Mentorship from senior engineers and designers','Flexible remote and hybrid working arrangements','Clear growth path from intern to full-time engineer','Collaborative culture that rewards curiosity','Exposure to the full product lifecycle'].map((item,i,arr)=>(
✓ {item}
))}
{/* INTERNSHIPS */}
Internship Opportunities

Start Your Journey Here

Hands-on internships with real mentorship, live projects, and a portfolio you'll be proud of.

{INTERNS.map(j=>)}
{/* FULL TIME */}
Full-Time Positions

Join the Core Team

{FULL.map(j=>)}
{/* CTA */}

Ready to Join Synnoviq?

Send your resume, portfolio, and a short note to:

synnoviqtechnologies@gmail.com Apply Now
);}
